name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus bag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Grey-brown suede trim adds a striking contrast to the design.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus bag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Grey-brown suede trim adds a striking contrast to the design.
Model: 752029
Size: 18*12*6cm
Color: Black PVC.
